news.headline: Acacia Research Corp acquires Deflecto for $103.7 million, a specialty manufacturer serving commercial markets.
news.summary: Acacia Research Corporation (Nasdaq: ACTG) has recently purchased Deflecto Acquisition, Inc. for $103.7 million. The acquisition of Deflecto, a prominent manufacturer in Indianapolis, Indiana, specializing in products for commercial transportation, HVAC, and office markets, falls in line with Acacia's strategy of acquiring and managing businesses in various sectors such as industrial, energy, and technology. This acquisition further strengthens Acacia's portfolio and expands its presence in these key markets.

news.headline: Cameroon construction industry to grow at 6.2% AAGR from 2025-2028 due to public-private investments in infrastructure.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Cameroon Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in Cameroon is projected to grow by 5.5% in real terms by 2024. This growth is attributed to increased investments in transport infrastructure, energy, and industrial sectors. The report covers sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets up to 2028. The data is sourced from the National Institute of Sta.

news.headline: INNOCOS Longevity 2025 summit in Miami, FL (March 2-4) brings together beauty and wellness industry, focusing on holistic well-being.
news.summary: A conference called "INNOCOS Longevity Miami" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The event brings together longevity clinics, wellness centers, and beauty and wellness brands to encourage partnerships, drive innovations, and enhance the crucial link between beauty and health. The INNOCOS Summit 2025 highlights that beauty goes beyond the surface and signifies overall well-being. Consumers are looking for more than just superficial solutions.

news.headline: Infermedica recognized as a top Clinical Decision Support company for 2024. Leader in AI-powered health solutions.
news.summary: In Denver on October 21, 2024, Infermedica, a prominent digital health company, was acknowledged as a top company in Clinical Decision Support for 2024. The company is known for its AI-powered solutions used in symptom analysis and patient triage. This recognition came after a comprehensive evaluation process.

news.headline: NORBIT increases share capital to NOK 6,375,002.70 with 63,750,027 shares at NOK 0.10 each for employee purchase program.
news.summary: Trondheim, 21 October 2024: NORBIT ASA acknowledges the previous disclosure made on 1 October 2024 concerning a share offering linked to the employee incentive stock purchase initiative. The recorded share capital escalation linked to the offering is now official in the Norwegian Register of Business Enterprises. The Company's updated share capital now amounts to NOK 6,375,002.70, distributed among 63,750,027 shares, each valued at NOK 0.10.

news.headline: S&P 500 defies odds, nears 6,000 target by end of year; driven by Fed and earnings outlook; may reach 6,600 by end of 2025.
news.summary: The S&P 500 has surpassed critical support levels and is expected to reach 6,000 by the year's end. This rise is fueled by the Federal Reserve indicating lower interest rates and strong earnings outlook. The 6,000 mark is seen as a potential stepping stone to higher highs, with projections suggesting a possible move to 6,600 by the end of next year. Earnings growth is a key driver behind this uptrend, with forecasts remaining strong despite slight moderation.Forecasts for FQ3 2024, FQ4, and the first half of next year stand at 4.1%, 14.2%, and 13.5% respectively, supporting the bullish market sentiment.

news.headline: Rising meat consumption in China is causing health concerns, with obesity rates increasing by 106% since 2000.
Caracal and I2Pure collaborate to launch new antimicrobial products, targeting diverse markets.
news.summary: In ASHBURN, Va., Caracal Products & Services is partnering with I2Pure to introduce innovative products to the market. Caracal, a certified Minority Business Enterprise and Tier 1 diversity spend supplier, specializes in providing a diverse range of products and services to companies, government agencies, and educational institutions. With strong connections in healthcare, insurance, and financial services, Caracal aims to deliver quality solutions.

news.headline: Strong US import surge reflects resilience of global trade, emphasizing goods exchange.
Stay updated on Alphabet's (GOOGL) stock quotes, company news, and chart analysis from Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Stay updated on the most recent developments from Alphabet, the parent company of Google. This includes stock quotes, company news, and chart analysis of Alphabet's stock (GOOGL). Investor's Business Daily provides insights and analysis on Alphabet's current standing in the market. Keep abreast of the latest trends and fluctuations in Alphabet's stock price to make informed investment decisions.

news.headline: Investors advised to buy Occidental Petroleum Co. (NYSE: OXY) and Microsoft Co. (NASDAQ: MSFT), sell Dollar General Co. (NYSE: DG).
news.summary: The article discusses the tendency of investors to follow successful investors on Wall Street, who are usually net buyers of the market. However, it suggests that other entities worth watching for superior strategies are hedge funds, which play both long and short sides of the stock market. It highlights two stocks to be bullish on - Occidental Petroleum (NYSE: OXY) and Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) due to energy sector's new cycle and tech growth, while recommending avoiding or shorting Dollar General (NYSE: DG) due to its struggling business model. The article mentions Stanley Druckenmiller's short position on U.S. bonds, predicting higher inflation due to rising prices post-COVID-19.

news.headline: Retired couple forced to return to U.S. due to 3 problems in Portugal.
UXLINK governance tokens listed on OKX, BYBIT, and UPBIT with $200 million daily trading volume, boosting liquidity and visibility.
news.summary: In Singapore on October 14, 2024, it was announced that UXLINK has successfully listed its governance tokens on prominent exchanges like OKX, BYBIT, and UPBIT. The daily trading volume for UXLINK tokens has surpassed $200 million. This development is significant as it boosts liquidity, enhances visibility, and improves accessibility for members of the UXLINK community.

news.headline: With the help of dedicated residents, Detroit is rebounding from bankruptcy and flourishing, though challenges persist.
news.summary: This Midwestern city, once the largest in the U.S. to declare bankruptcy, has made significant strides towards recovery. Despite its previous financial struggles, the city is now thriving. However, there are still some challenges that need to be addressed to ensure continued progress.

news.headline: Get ahead in Bored Ape Yacht Club's Dookey Dash: Unclogged with this guide on dominating the game for real rewards.
news.summary: The new game Dookey Dash: Unclogged by Bored Ape Yacht Club offers players an endless runner experience with opportunities to win real prizes. Players can navigate through the sewers and compete for rewards in this exciting game. Follow these tips to dominate the game and increase your chances of winning.

news.headline: OneOncology partners with Southeastern Medical Center to expand cancer care in Eastern North Carolina.
news.summary: A recent partnership has been unveiled between OneOncology, a nationally recognized platform led by physicians that supports independent oncology practices, and Southeastern Medical Center (SMOC), a physician-owned oncology practice based in Goldsboro, N.C. This collaboration, confirmed on October 21, 2024, aims to strengthen oncology services. This strategic alliance highlights the commitment to improving cancer care and is poised to positively impact many individuals.

news.headline: Bombardier begins production of Global 8000 business jet, set for release in 2025, known for being world’s fastest and longest-range private jet, with smooth ride and healthy cabin.
news.summary: In Montreal on October 21, 2024, Bombardier revealed the commencement of manufacturing major structural components for the first Global 8000 production jet. Production is taking place in Bombardier facilities located in Saint-Laurent (Québec), Red Oak (Texas), and Querétaro (Mexico). Expected to be operational in the latter part of 2025, the Global 8000 private jet is poised to hold the distinction as the fastest and longest-range purpose-built business jet globally. Notable for its exceptionally smooth ride and the industry’s most spacious cabin, the aircraft has been performing impressively in flight tests, consistently delivering favorable outcomes.

news.headline: TSMC's growing market dominance raises concerns beyond competitors.
Netflix stock hits all-time high as profits surge. Check new additions to IBD 50, Sector Leaders, Big Cap 20, IPO Leaders.
news.summary: Discover the latest updates on stocks similar to Netflix that have recently been included in or excluded from IBD's stock lists, such as the IBD 50, Sector Leaders, IBD Big Cap 20, and IPO Leaders. Netflix's stock has reached an all-time high following a significant surge in profits. Explore the new additions to IBD 50, Stock Spotlight, and other lists. The article can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Which American president proved to be the most financially sound? Find out more in this surprising report.
Proxy advisory firms Glass Lewis and ISS support Terran Orbital's proposed merger, recommending stockholders to vote "FOR." (Characters: 101)
news.summary: Aerospace company Terran Orbital Corporation (NYSE: LLAP) based in Boca Raton, Fla., revealed that independent proxy advisory firms Glass Lewis & Co. and Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) have suggested stockholders to vote in favor of adopting the Agreement and Plan of Merger. The Merger Agreement, dated August 15, 2024, involves Terran Orbital and Lockheed Martin Corporation. The recommendation comes with the backing of key advisory bodies, a significant move in the vote for the merger deal.

news.headline: ECB's Kazimir: I would like to see more evidence of services disinflation before declaring victory.
ECB's Kazimir: I am increasingly confident that the disinflation path is on solid footing, but need more evidence.
ECB's Kazimir: The December meeting is wide open, all options remain on the table.
ECB's Kazimir: If the accelerated pace in disinflation is confirmed, we will be in a strong and comfortable position to continue the easing cycle.

OPEC cuts 2024 oil demand growth estimate by 106,000 bpd, now expects global demand to increase by 1.93 million bpd next year, leading to a more than 2% drop in oil prices. Netanyahu raises doubts on US commitment to restricting Iranian exports.
news.summary: Oil prices decreased by more than 2% following OPEC's third consecutive cut in global oil demand growth estimates. West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude dropped 2.2% to under $74 per barrel, in addition to a 0.4% fall the previous Friday. OPEC revised its 2024 oil demand estimate by 106,000 barrels per day to predict a 1.93 million bpd increase. The 2025 forecast was reduced by 102,000 bpd to 1.6 million bpd. This adjusts the expected total global oil demand in 2024 to 105.8 million bpd. Lack of Chinese fiscal stimulus details also affected broader commodity markets.

news.headline: Man detained in Japan after targeting governing party HQ; culprit attempted breach at office of PM Ishiba, Tokyo police disclosed.
news.summary: Police in Tokyo reported that an individual attempted to breach security at the office of the newly appointed Prime Minister, Shigeru Ishiba.

news.headline: Fed's Waller cautions on interest-rate cuts due to disappointing inflation data. Economy solid, GDP grew 2.2% in H1 2024. PCE growth at 2.5%.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher J. Waller expressed concerns about recent inflation data during a conference at Stanford University. He noted that while the U.S. economy is strong and near the Federal Open Market Committee's maximum employment objective, there have been disappointing inflation upticks. Despite progress in reducing inflation, recent figures show uneven movement towards the Fed's 2% target. Waller praised the economy's resilience and mentioned that real GDP grew at a 2.2% annual rate in the first half of 2024, with expectations of further acceleration in the third quarter. He highlighted the strength in consumer spending and noted that growth in personal consumption expenditures has averaged around 2.5% this year. Waller emphasized the presence of considerable pent-up demand as interest rates fall. Lower-income groups continue to face financial strain, but the economy appears stronger than previously thought, with little sign of a major slowdown in economic activity.

news.headline: FBI arrests Alabama man for hacking SEC's X account, falsely announcing Bitcoin ETF approval, causing Bitcoin price surge ($1,000) & drop ($2,000).
news.summary: An Alabama resident, Eric Council Jr., was arrested by the FBI for reportedly hacking the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC)'s social media account earlier this year. He is accused of conspiring with others to gain unauthorized access to the SEC's account in January. Using the name of SEC Chair Gary Gensler, Council allegedly made a false announcement about the approval of a Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) exchange-traded fund (ETF). As a result of this fake news, Bitcoin's price surged by over $1,000, but then dropped by more than $2,000 after the SEC regained control of its account, declaring the announcement a security breach.

news.headline: Dow Jones up, Warren Buffett raises stake, Cathie Wood unloads stock on 106% run; Nvidia rallies.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced an uptick in the stock market fueled by a surge in Nvidia. The renowned investor Warren Buffett increased his stake in a particular stock, while influential investor Cathie Wood opted to sell shares in a successful company. The stock market saw significant activity with a 106% increase in value. This news was covered live without mentioning the specific source.

news.headline: Popular TV host Natalia Morari's career plummeted after a controversial move - having a child with a corrupt tycoon, and running against Moldova's pro-West president.
news.summary: Natalia Morari, a former anti-corruption reporter in Moldova, has stirred controversy by having a child with a prominent businessman linked to corruption allegations. This has garnered significant attention as she is now running against the pro-West president in the upcoming elections. The situation has raised eyebrows and attracted criticism due to the perceived contradiction in Morari's actions considering her background as an anti-corruption advocate.

news.headline: Russell 2000 index nears key 2,300-point level, aiming for a breakout as S&P 500 hits 2024 highs. Small caps may outperform large caps on economic growth and lower rates.
news.summary: The Russell 2000 Index, representing small-cap stocks, is approaching a key resistance level of 2,300 points, last reached in July. While other major indices like the S&P 500 and Dow Jones have hit new highs in 2024, the Russell 2000 is still 6.7% below its peak. Analysts are optimistic about a potential breakout for small caps, driven by economic growth and lower interest rates. This shift could bring small-cap stocks in line with their larger counterparts. Adam Turnquist from LPL highlights that small caps are more sensitive to economic factors and interest rates. Market participants are closely monitoring this situation for potential investment opportunities.

news.headline: Bitwise CEO predicts 6-figure Bitcoin price by 2025 due to halving event; 2021 expected to be exceptional.
news.summary: Bitcoin supporters have reason to be hopeful as Bitwise's Chief Investment Officer, Matt Hougan, predicts that the popular cryptocurrency could reach a price in the six figures by 2025. Hougan discussed various factors contributing to this potential surge in a recent interview. He highlighted the halving event in April, which halved miners' rewards, as a key factor affecting Bitcoin's market behavior. Hougan confidently stated, "I think it's going to be a new all-time high. I think it's going to be six-figure Bitcoin for sure." Despite acknowledging the risks involved in investing in this volatile market, he expressed optimism for Bitcoin's prospects in 2025.

news.headline: S&P 500 hits new high; Nvidia closes at record level. Dow Jones Futures positive as Apple nears buy point.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones are looking up as the S&P 500 reached a new high on Monday, with Nvidia stocks also hitting a record high close. Apple is on the verge of reaching a potential buy point. The S&P 500's bullish trend continues, reflecting positive market sentiment. Nvidia's stock surge has propelled it to an all-time high. Meanwhile, Apple's stock is showing signs of a potential upward momentum, indicating a possible buy opportunity on the horizon. This development underscores the robust performance of these key players in the market.

news.headline: Once a DIY celebration, Halloween in America has become a retail powerhouse, with significant growth in consumer spending.
news.summary: In the past, Americans were accustomed to creating their own Halloween costumes and homemade candy. However, over time, the holiday has evolved into a highly commercialized event, becoming a significant driver of the economy. This transformation has resulted in Halloween now being a major economic powerhouse, with the National Retail Federation estimating that Americans collectively spend over $10 billion each year on costumes, decorations, candy, and other related items. The holiday has shifted from its traditional roots to a consumer-driven extravaganza, showcasing the substantial impact that Halloween has on the country's economic landscape.

news.headline: Top pharmacy benefit managers profit by underpaying independent drugstores, leading to closures nationwide.
news.summary: Large pharmacy benefit managers are making significant profits by consistently underpaying independent drugstores, leading to the emergence of "pharmacy deserts" nationwide. This practice has affected a substantial number of pharmacies, exacerbating the issue of limited access to healthcare services in many communities.

news.headline: Dow Jones at record high; Amazon surges, Nvidia rebounds; Nasdaq affected by sell-off. Taiwan Semi results awaited.
news.summary: Despite Tuesday's sell-off continuing to affect the Nasdaq, the Dow Jones Index saw an increase in the stock market today. The Dow Jones hit a record high, showing strong performance. Amazon experienced a significant surge, while Nvidia rebounded and Taiwan Semi results were awaited. This positive movement in the market suggests a resilient economy amidst recent fluctuations.

news.headline: Kevin O'Leary wants 400% tariffs on China, Mark Cuban disagrees citing business concerns.
news.summary: Entrepreneurs and "Shark Tank" stars, Mark Cuban and Kevin O’Leary, also known as “Mr. Wonderful,” clashed over China's tariffs. O’Leary expressed dissatisfaction with China’s trade practices on X, formerly Twitter. He proposed raising tariffs to 400%, citing China’s unfair business practices over decades. O’Leary advocated for significant action to compel China to negotiate, paralleling Donald Trump's approach. Mark Cuban engaged in a dispute with a former Trump advisor regarding the ex-President's remarks on American auto workers. Having been engaged in business with China for years, O’Leary highlighted the lack of fairness in their dealings and urged for a tougher stance against them.

news.headline: Robinhood's Steve Quirk highlights Bitcoin as top investment for users, platform grows to cater all audiences, average age: low 30s.
news.summary: This article has been updated to clarify that Bitcoin is the top recurring investment, not the most traded asset, on the Robinhood platform. Robinhood Markets has expanded its user base from primarily young and retail users to a more diverse audience, according to Chief Brokerage Officer Steve Quirk. Quirk, with experience at TD Ameritrade and the Cboe, noted that Robinhood customers skew towards a younger demographic, with an average age in the early 30s. He highlighted both similarities and differences between traditional trading firms and Robinhood, stating that their product development is influenced by these distinctions. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: September retail sales report will show if US consumers continued to drive economic growth. Forecasted increase of 0.3% m/m, with some predicting higher at 0.8%. Wall Street analysts expect a strong retail sales report.
news.summary: On Thursday at 8:30 a.m. ET, the retail sales report for September will be released, giving insight into household spending in the final month of the third quarter. Analysts project a 0.3% increase in retail sales from August, suggesting a slight improvement. Bank of America forecasts a higher rise of 0.8%, indicating a potentially stronger performance. Economist Aditya Bhave anticipates gains above consensus, with a 0.7% to 0.8% increase in retail sales excluding autos and core control group. The report is expected to reflect continued growth in consumer spending, supporting overall economic expansion.

news.headline: Farmland Partners Inc. completes $289 million farmland sale comprising 46 farms with 41,554 acres across multiple states.
news.summary: Farmland Partners Inc. (NYSE: FPI) has officially closed the sale of a portfolio of farmland to Farmland Reserve, Inc. The transaction, which took place on October 16, 2024, included 46 farms totaling 41,554 acres across several states - Arkansas, Florida, Louisiana, Mississippi, Nebraska, Oklahoma, and the Carolinas. The deal, valued at $289 million, was an all-cash agreement.

news.headline: Domino's partners with St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, offers customers chance to donate during checkout. #Charity #pizza.
news.summary: In ANN ARBOR, Mich., on Oct. 21, 2024, Domino's Pizza Inc. (NYSE: DPZ), the leading global pizza company, announced that customers will have the option to donate or round up their bill in support of the St. Jude Thanks and Giving® campaign. This initiative will run during the upcoming season of giving. Domino's Pizza Inc. is the largest pizza company globally and operates through its franchise.

news.headline: Kirkland's partners with Bed Bath & Beyond for neighborhood store strategy, investing $25 million for growth.
news.summary: A strategic partnership has been formed between Kirkland's Home and Beyond, Inc. aiming to enhance sustainable profitable growth by leveraging the core strengths of both companies. Beyond plans to invest $25 million through a combination of debt and equity transactions to bolster Kirkland's capital position and support its growth strategies.

news.headline: Onity Group plans to offer $475 million in Senior Notes due 2029 through Escrow Issuer, a PHH Corporation subsidiary.
news.summary: West Palm Beach, Florida, October 21, 2024 - Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT), a top non-bank mortgage servicer and originator, disclosed that its subsidiary PHH Escrow Issuer LLC is gearing up to launch $475 million in Senior Notes due 2029. The offering is contingent on various factors including market circumstances.

news.headline: WiSA Technologies to participate in upcoming investor conferences; details and locations to be shared in the coming weeks.
news.summary: WiSA Technologies, based in Beaverton, Oregon, has disclosed that its management team will be engaging in investor events in the upcoming weeks. This is a notable development for WiSA Technologies, which specializes in wireless audio technology solutions. The exact dates and details of these events have not been specified in the announcement. This move signifies an effort by WiSA Technologies to engage with investors and potentially attract new interest in the company. Investors and industry experts will be watching closely to see how these events impact WiSA Technologies and its stock symbol, WISA.

news.headline: Top UK mobile app dev company Hyperlink InfoSystem dominates global market. UK boasts talented developers and flourishing tech industry.
news.summary: In London and New York on October 21, 2024, it was reported that the United Kingdom is becoming a major contender in the global app development industry. The country boasts a significant number of skilled developers, a strong emphasis on innovation, and a flourishing tech community. This has led to a surge in app development activities, with a notable increase in the number of new apps being created.

news.headline: GES to be acquired by Truelink Capital, a private equity firm based in LA, for accelerated growth. (Total characters: 97)
news.summary: Today, on October 21, 2024, GES, a top player in the global exhibition and event sector, revealed that its parent company, Viad Corp, along with Truelink Capital, a private equity company from Los Angeles, have engaged in a strategic transaction. This move is anticipated to fuel GES's growth and development at an accelerated pace.

news.headline: Cyngn's DriveMod Forklift completes first paid deployment at customer site, key step in commercialization.
news.summary: Cyngn, based in Menlo Park, California, shared news on Oct. 21, 2024, about the successful completion of the inaugural paid autonomous deployment of its DriveMod Forklift at a customer site. This accomplishment signifies a significant advancement in the journey towards commercializing Cyngn's latest vehicle for Enterprise use.

news.headline: Senior Venture Partner Dr. Ernest Mario passed away; joined Pappas Capital in 2002. Sad loss for the firm.
news.summary: In a statement released on October 21, 2024, Research Triangle Park, N.C.-based Pappas Capital expressed profound sorrow at the loss of Senior Venture Partner Dr. Ernest Mario. Dr. Mario, who had been a part of the firm's Scientific Advisory Board since 2002, transitioned to the role of Senior Venture Partner during his tenure. His passing was met with deep sadness by all involved in the organization.

news.headline: Positive results presented for Phase II study of ABBV-RGX-314 at AAO 2024, showing 97% reduction in treatment burden and no cases of intraocular inflammation.
news.summary: After receiving treatment with ABBV-RGX-314, there was a significant 97% decrease in treatment burden observed at the nine-month mark. The data indicated that the treatment had a favorable safety and efficacy profile, with results aligning with findings from various previous studies. Additionally, there were zero instances of intraocular inflammation reported, indicating that the treatment was well tolerated. This outcome occurred without the use of prophylactic measures.
